name: Chandru
about: Chandru is a BBA student and also AI-focused developer with hands-on experience building Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Generative AI applications, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based document question-answering systems, intent-driven chatbots, and sentiment analysis models. Proficient in Python, prompt engineering, embeddings-based retrieval workflows, and AI application integration. Experienced in designing intelligent systems that leverage NLP techniques to improve user interaction and information retrieval.Passionate about applying AI to solve real-world problems and continuously expanding knowledge in machine learning, deep learning, and Large Language Models (LLMs). Seeking an AI/ML internship or entry-level opportunity to contribute to innovative products, collaborate with engineering teams, and gain hands-on experience in building scalable AI-powered solutions within startup and technology-driven environments.

completed at Computer Software College(CSC), kumbakonam. at October 2023
